feature: MCP health check: resolve the host and block metadata/link-local addresses
workflow_rationale: Single-service security fix to web-server. No worker/frontend/database components. Clear, scoped requirements with reference implementation already available (net_guard.py). Can be completed as one phase with sequential subtasks.

phases.name: Implement SSRF Guard and Update check_mcp_health
phases.description: Add a helper function to validate MCP server URLs, blocking metadata/link-local/reserved addresses while allowing loopback and private ranges. Update check_mcp_health to use this guard.

subtasks.description: Create _assert_safe_mcp_url helper function in git.py following net_guard.py patterns
subtasks.notes: ✅ COMPLETED - Created UnsafeMcpURLError exception, _resolve_mcp_addresses() and _assert_safe_mcp_url() helper. Blocks cloud-metadata (169.254.0.0/16) and link-local ranges (fe80::/10, fd00::/8, fc00::/7). Allows private/loopback since MCP servers often run locally. Verification: import works, tested with safe/unsafe URLs.

verification.command: python -c "import apps.web_server.server.routes.git as g; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource(g.check_mcp_health); assert '_assert_safe_mcp_url' in src; print('Updated OK')"

subtasks.notes: ✅ COMPLETED - Updated check_mcp_health to use _assert_safe_mcp_url(). Replaced inline scheme/hostname checks with helper call. Added exception handling for UnsafeMcpURLError and OSError. Returns unhealthy status with appropriate message for unsafe/unresolvable URLs.

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive tests for _assert_safe_mcp_url in test_mcp_health_check.py
subtasks.notes: ✅ COMPLETED - Created 25 comprehensive tests for _assert_safe_mcp_url following test_net_guard.py patterns. Test coverage: (1) 169.254.169.254 blocked, (2) IPv6 link-local (fe80::/10) blocked, (3) IPv6 unique-local (fd00::/8, fc00::/7) blocked, (4) file:// rejected, (5) http://localhost allowed, (6) http://127.0.0.1 allowed, (7) private 10.x/172.16/192.168 allowed, (8) public hosts allowed, (9) DNS failure raises OSError, (10) IPv4-mapped IPv6 normalized correctly, (11) DNS-rebinding attacks detected. Updated conftest.py to add apps/web-server to sys.path when FastAPI available. All 25 tests pass.

subtasks.description: Verify existing test suite still passes after modifications

verification.expected: All MCP status route tests pass

subtasks.notes: ✅ COMPLETED - Verified all 5 existing MCP status route tests pass after modifications to check_mcp_health. No backward compatibility issues - existing API contracts are maintained.

acceptance_criteria: Helper function _assert_safe_mcp_url properly resolves hostnames and validates against all blocked ranges
check_mcp_health uses the helper and returns status: 'unknown' when URL is unsafe
All test cases from AC#6 pass
Existing test suite (test_mcp_status_route.py) passes without modification

verification_steps.name: Integration Tests for check_mcp_health endpoint
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All existing MCP status tests pass

verification_steps.name: Code Review: SSRF Guard Implementation
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Helper checks all resolved addresses, handles IPv4-mapped IPv6, loopback checked before reserved

verification_strategy.reasoning: Security-critical code requires comprehensive test coverage. All blocked ranges and edge cases must be verified. Existing API must remain compatible.
